creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed with the following changes:
- LICENSE is really an MIT-style license, so there isn't a need to come up with some new name for it
- I couldn't get this to pass the check-plist stage as it was installing the docs twice, so since the docs are pre-generated, I just used them instead of regenerating them
- A few tweaks to get this to pass portlint -C
